body: [b][color color=#1D80A6]Aerochat v0.3.0[/color][/b]: First version of Updated Aerochat, with some new options and features, as well as improved stability. Thank you for using!

[b]Interested in Aerochat development?[/b] Aerochat is free-and-open-source software which is maintained through community contributions. Please check out [link url=https://github.com/Maxokie/Updated-Aerochat]our GitHub repository[/link] if you'd like to help out. You don't have to be a skilled programmer or anything.
